confirmed.note: static helper decode_amount_from_payload() added verbatim to both l1_l2_bridge.cpp:31-40 and l2_l3_bridge.cpp:29-38 in the same commit; make_nonce_key/sha256d_stub already duplicated across the two bridge files
stakeTokens (300-306) and unstakeTokens (308-314) verbatim copy except RPC method literal staking/stake vs staking/unstake; the handler branches 215-218 / 219-222 are the same edited-copy pair

AddTransaction (basic-validation then pending_transactions_.push_back) copied between plasma_chain.cpp:51-67 and optimistic_rollup.cpp:53-69 with only the struct field names renamed (sender/recipient vs from/to)

false_positives.what_happened: the 1-line test helper `static std::vector<uint8_t> Addr(uint8_t b){return std::vector<uint8_t>(32,b);}` plus the per-test scaffolding (std::cout<<"Test: ..."; assert(...); std::cout<<"  \u2713 Passed") are duplicated identically across test_staking/test_treasury/test_emergency/test_eventlog/test_fee_router. Detector flags it as cross-file dup, but it is shared trivial test boilerplate, not transplanted logic.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: under tests/** raise the cross-file token threshold and add a min-distinct-identifier-density gate; treat a chunk whose body is only stdlib container construction + assert/cout calls (no project-domain symbol other than the type-under-test) as boilerplate and drop it. A 1-line helper is below the token floor already; the real noise is the assert-block scaffolding.

false_positives.what_happened: GetBlock (42-49) vs GetBatch in optimistic_rollup are the canonical find-in-map accessor: `auto it=map.find(k); if(it==map.end()) return nullopt; return it->second;`. Five lines, structurally identical because it is the standard std::optional map-lookup idiom, not copied business logic.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: add an idiom-suppression filter for the std::optional/map-lookup accessor pattern (find -> end-compare -> nullopt/second). Either ignore chunks <=6 lines whose only control flow is a single end()-guard, or normalize this accessor shape into a recognized idiom token so identical accessors across sibling container classes do not register as clones.

cycle.desc: no include cycle: archcheck --graph reports sccs_cyclic=0, largest_scc=1 over 302 nodes / 482 edges
